title: Treasury yields are little changed as U.S.-Iran ceasefire strained; investors await inflation data
summary_full: The yield on the 10-year U.S. Treasury note — the key benchmark for U.S. government borrowing — was broadly unchanged at 4.473%.
summary_public: The yield on the 10-year U.S. Treasury note — the key benchmark for U.S. government borrowing — was broadly unchanged at 4.473%.
